basic_details.job_title: KBCAOS Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: KBCAOS Allahabad University has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 2 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) vacancies have been announced on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates with a Post Graduate Degree (M.Sc./ M.Tech), BE/ B.Tech, or M.Tech in the relevant disciplines along with UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE or other National Level Examination qualification can apply through email on or before 14 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) in Atmospheric and Ocean Science/Earth System Science/ Meteorology/ Geophysics/ Geology/ Physics/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science OR BE/ BTech/ MTech in Meteorology/ Atmosphere/ Ocean/ Marine/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Computer Engineering/ Information Technology, Must have cleared UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE/ National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions, At least 60% marks at Under Graduate and Post Graduate degree level, Knowledge of Big Data Analysis, Mathematical Modeling, Climate Models, Artificial Intelligence, HPC, LINUX, MATLAB, C++, Python (desirable)
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree (MSc/ MTech) in Atmospheric and Ocean Science/Earth System Science/ Meteorology/ Geophysics/ Geology/ Physics/ Mathematics/ Statistics/ Computer Science OR BE/ BTech/ MTech degree in Meteorology/ Atmosphere/ Ocean/ Marine/ Mechanical/ Civil/ Computer Engineering/ Information Technology from Govt. recognized Universities/Institutes. Must have cleared UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE/ National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. At least 60% marks at UG and PG level. Knowledge of Big Data Analysis, Mathematical Modeling, Climate Models, Artificial Intelligence, HPC, LINUX, MATLAB, C++, Python (desirable).

salary_details.details: Rs.37000+18%HRA (first 2 years) as JRF and Rs.42000+18%HRA (3rd year) as SRF

selection_process: Shortlisting on merit and project requirements Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KBCAOS Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the KBCAOS Allahabad University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download KBCAOS Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

Must have cleared UGC NET/ CSIR NET/ GATE/ National Level Examinations conducted by Central Govt. Departments and their Agencies and Institutions. At least 60% marks at UG and PG level. Knowledge of Big Data Analysis, Mathematical Modeling, Climate Models, Artificial Intelligence, HPC, LINUX, MATLAB, C++, Python (desirable).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for KBCAOS Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KBCAOS Allahabad University Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KBCAOS Allahabad University JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is 14th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position by KBCAOS Allahabad University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate Degree (MSc/MTech) or BE/BTech/MTech in relevant fields and must have cleared UGC NET/CSIR NET/GATE/National Level Examinations.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position ranges from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, with additional HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for this recruitment by sending their application via Email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the KBCAOS Allahabad University located?
faq.answer: KBCAOS Allahabad University is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211002.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable skills for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Desirable skills include knowledge of Big Data Analysis, Mathematical Modeling, Climate Models, Artificial Intelligence, HPC, LINUX, MATLAB, C++, and Python.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is on a contractual basis.
